events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes sagging flex duct exceeding ½ inch per foot between supports, which violates SMACNA and IMC 603 requirements. Work is rough-complete at ~70%. This is a defect requiring rework. Decision should be fail due to non-compliance.

    "Sagging flex duct exceeds ½ in/ft between supports, violating SMACNA support/spacing requirements",
    "Excess sag restricts airflow and can collect condensate, deviating from Manual D design airflow"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-support flex duct to manufacturer/SMACNA spacing (typically ≤4 ft for flex, ≤5 ft for metal) and eliminate sag",
    "Pull flex taut per manufacturer instructions without overstretching inner liner",
    "Re-inspect supports, straps, and hangers for proper pitch and securement before close-in"
  ],
  "rationale": "Flex duct installed with sag beyond the ½ in/ft limit is non-compliant with IMC 603 and SMACNA installation standards; it must be corrected before close-out, so the work fails rough inspection.",
